infringements.steward_decision_summary: 2026 MONACO GRAND PRIX 07 - 09 June 2026 The Stewards From The Stewards To The Team Manager, Oracle Red Bull Racing Document 84 Date 07 June 2026 Time 19:37 The Stewards, having received a report from the Race Director, have considered the following matter and determine the following: No / Driver 6

raw_text_excerpt:
2026 MONACO GRAND PRIX
07 - 09 June 2026
The Stewards
From The Stewards
To The Team Manager,
Oracle Red Bull Racing
Document 84
Date 07 June 2026
Time 19:37
The Stewards, having received a report from the Race Director, have considered the following
matter and determine the following:
No / Driver 6 - Isack Hadjar
Competitor Oracle Red Bull Racing
Time 16:33
Session Race
Fact Car 6 Allegedly left a gap of more than 10 lengths whilst behind the Safety Car
Infringement Alleged breach of Article B5.13.2 of the FIA F1 Regulations.
Decision No further action.
Reason The Stewards reviewed positioning/marshalling system data, video, timing, telemetry,
team radio and in-car video evidence.
It was noted that at a previous event (Canada 2025) Race Control had advised that in
the interests of safety it would allow a certain degree of tolerance in relation to such
alleged breaches, as drivers were required to prepare tyres and power units.
Accordingly no further action is taken.
Competitors are reminded that they have the right to appeal certain decisions of the
Stewards, in accordance with Article 15 of the FIA International Sporting Code and
Chapter 5 of the FIA Judicial and Disciplinary Rule
